title: High-stakes summit in China, U.S. response to Hantavirus outbreak, Pentagon releases UFO files
35 Years After UFO Encounter, Cheyenne Man Still Trying To Figure Out What He Saw
description: A Cheyenne attorney and his father, a former Wyoming attorney general, saw what they described as a huge, super-bright UFO while driving on Highway 59 in 1991. Now 35 years later, Richard Barrett says he’s still trying to figure out what they saw.
